problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: Combining Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
